entries.title: HOMILIES ON NUMBERS 27:12 on numbers 33:16
entries.excerpt: From there they come to the Tombs of Lust [Kibroth-hattavah]. What are the Tombs of Lust? Doubtless it is where lusts are buried and covered over, where all desire is quenched and the flesh no longer lusts against the spirit, since it has been put to death by the death of Christ.
